debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
C : Error.Call n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
IH :
  ∀ (o : Error.maxOne n σ)
    (a_kv_b :
      Error.eval n S ⟨σ, o⟩
        (Error.Form.Neg n
          (Error.Form.Con n (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))))
            (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))))))),
    (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, o⟩
o : Error.maxOne n (C :: σ)
a_kv_b :
  Error.eval n S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩
    (Error.Form.Neg n
      (Error.Form.Con n (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))))
        (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))))))
ra : Error.roleOfIn n a C = Error.Role.Callee
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩

failed_attempts:
· specialize IH (⁻o) h
        unfold resultSet
        simp only [ra, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def]
        let C_copy := C
        cases C <;> simp_all <;> subst ra
        <;> try { contradiction }
        <;> try {
          refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
          <;> simp_all [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def, not_forall, Bool.not_eq_not]
          <;> try { use S <;> simp_all }
          <;> try { use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩ <;> simp_all }
          <;> try { aesop }
        }
        <;> try {
          simp_all [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def, not_forall, Bool.not_eq_not]
          <;> try { use S <;> simp_all }
          <;> try { use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩ <;> simp_all }
          <;> try { aesop }
        }
      · clear IH
        rw [eval_dis] at h
        push_neg at h
        rcases h with ⟨a_not_know_before_t, a_not_know_before_f⟩
        rw [eval_dis] at a_kv_b
        rcases a_kv_b with (a_knows_after_t | a_knows_after_f)
        · have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
          simp at this
          unfold resultSet
          cases C <;> simp [ra] <;> simp at ra <;> subst ra
          case neg.inl.normal c =>
            refine ⟨⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
            · use S
              simp [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def, not_forall, Bool.not_eq_not]
              <;> simp_all
            · cases S b <;>  simp_all
            · use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩
              simp
              expose_names
              use ⌜a c⌝
              simp
            · intro not_in_callee not_a_knows T τ same_len equ C role_C same_contrib
              cases h_b : S b
              all_goals
                simp_all
          <;> simp_all
          <;> try { contradiction }
          <;> try { aesop }
        · have := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_f
          simp at this
          unfold resultSet
          cases C <;> simp [ra] <;> simp at ra <;> subst ra
          case neg.inl.normal c =>
            refine ⟨⟨⟨?_, ?_⟩, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
            · use S
              simp [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def, not_forall, Bool.not_eq_not]
              <;> simp_all
            · cases S b <;>  simp_all
            · use S, ⟨σ,⁻o⟩
              simp
              expose_names
              use ⌜a c⌝
              simp
            · intro not_in_callee not_a_knows T τ same_len equ C role_C same_contrib
              cases h_b : S b
              all_goals
                simp_all
          <;> simp_all
          <;> try { contradiction }
          <;> try { aesop }
    case Other =>
      have h₁ : eval S ⟨σ,⁻o⟩ (Kv a b) ↔ eval S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ (Kv a b) := by
        apply not_in_call_then_invariant_kv
        <;> simp [ra]
      have h₂ : h₁.mp
      have h₃ : h₁.mpr
      have h₄ : eval S ⟨σ,⁻o⟩ (Kv a b) := by
        have h₅ := a_kv_b
        simp_all [h₁]
      have h₅ := IH (⁻o) h₄
      have h₆ : (b, S b) ∈ S⌈σ,⁻o⌉a ∧ (b, !S b) ∉ S⌈σ,⁻o⌉a := h₅
      have h₇ : (b, S b) ∈ S⌈C :: σ, o⌉a ∧ (b, !S b) ∉ S⌈C :: σ, o⌉a := by
        have h₈ : S⌈C :: σ, o⌉a = S⌈σ,⁻o⌉a := by
          apply not_in_call_then_invariant_resultSet
          <;> simp [ra]
        rw [h₈]
        exact h₆
      exact h₇

by_cases h : (a : ℕ) = (b : ℕ)
              <;> simp_all [Dist.eval, Kv, OSequence.eval, resultSet]
              <;> aesop
            })
      exact h8
    exact ⟨h3, h6⟩
  exact h1

simp [Error.resultSet, h] at *
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try
        {
          intro h₄
          simp_all [Error.eval, Error.maxOne]
          <;>
          (try decide)
        })
    -- Combine the results
    constructor
    · -- (b, S b) ∈ resultSet
      simpa [h] using h₂
    · -- (b, !S b) ∉ resultSet
      simpa [h] using h₃

<;>
            (try by_cases h₁ : S b <;> simp_all [Error.eval, Error.equiv, Error.maxOne])
            <;>
            (try
              {
                exfalso
                have := a_knows_after_t
                simp_all [Error.eval, Error.equiv, Error.maxOne]
                <;>
                (try omega)
                <;>
                (try aesop)
              })
